species: Discovery of a small protein-encoding cis-regulatory overlapping gene of the tumor suppressor gene Scribble in humans
sample_source: performed proteogenomic data mining in human cancer cell lines
anatomic_site_tumor: in human endometrial (Fig. 5a) and breast (Fig. 5b) primary tumors
cell_line: publicly available RNA-Seq datasets of the human transcriptome from cancer cell lines (HeLa, MCF-7, A549, and HCT-116)
